ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the movie */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's poster image */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie, if available */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_id" TEXT /* Rotten Tomatoes ID of the movie, if available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-generated tag */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the tag is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "tag_text" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tagged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user tagged the movie */,
  "tag_source" TEXT /* Source of the tag (e.g., user-generated, moderator-approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the rating is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user rated the movie */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., user-generated, critic review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user view */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the user watched */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who watched the movie */,
  "watched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was watched */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in seconds */,
  "watched_duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie watched by the user in seconds */,
  "watched_progress" REAL /* Progress of the movie watched by the user (e.g., 50% completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "searched_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the search was performed */,
  "results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned by the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., approve, delete, edit) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_target" TEXT /* Target of the moderator action (e.g., user, movie, tag) */,
  "action_target_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target of the moderator action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user feedback */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the feedback is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the user's feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference is stored */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., notification settings, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genre_associations" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie associated with the genre */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre associated with the movie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlist_items" (
  "watchlist_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist that the item belongs to */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie in the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_items_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES user_watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)
